    Function reference

    All functions

    build_object_tree()
    Build the tree of accessible database object
    clear_cache()
    Clear the cache
    coalesce()
    Reduce by coalescing columns
    coalesce_exclude_null()
    Reduce by coalescing columns, excluding resulting null values
    codes_from()
    Remap a column of codes to hierarchy of strings
    drop_detail()
    Drop detail from a clinical codes column
    drop_tags()
    Remove tags from a clinical codes column
    gen_casewhen()
    Generate the case-when list to use in the dplyr query
    gen_cds_map()
    Parse CDS technical output specification
    gen_clean_apc()
    Generate a synthetic admitted patient care database
    gen_code_map()
    Generate ICD code mapping for SQL queries
    gen_swd_map()
    Read SWD guide
    get_codes()
    Parse multiple codes files
    get_metadata()
    Get metadata list
    get_tbl()
    Get a dplyr::tbl corresponding to a table
    has_tag()
    Filter by tag
    icd10_index_codes()
    Index a codes definition structure
    icd10_indices_to_code()
    Convert indices lists to ICD-10 codes
    icd10_str_to_indices()
    Parse an ICD-10 code string
    icd_api_fetch_all()
    Fetch ICD-10 codes
    icd_api_get_codes()
    Generate a codes file from the ICD-10 API
    icd_api_request()
    Make a request to the WHO ICD API
    icd_api_token()
    Get the API token
    icd_combine_files()
    Combine ICD-10 chapter files
    icdb_example()
    Generate example data
    make_table_getter()
    Get a function which returns a table object
    mapped_server()
    Create a mapped databases (logical database object)
    new_icd10()
    Make an ICD-10 object from a string
    new_node()
    node object for intermediate positions in the object tree.
    nhs_number_valid()
    Check NHS number validity
    parse_codes()
    Get a flat list of codes
    parse_mapping()
    Mapping-tree parser
    prune_level1()
    Flush and prune the level 1 cache
    random_nhs_number()
    Make a random NHS number
    read_cache()
    Read an object from the cache
    read_include()
    Read an included config file.
    run()
    Collect and cache SQL query results
    server-class
    server class wrapping an SQL server connection
    server()
    Construct a server object
    show(<mapped_server>)
    Print the mapped_server object
    show(<server>)
    Print out the Databases object
    show_cache()
    Summarise the cache
    sql_from_file(<server>,<character>)
    Perform a SQL query from a file
    sql_from_file()
    Submit an SQL query from a file and get the results
    sql_query(<server>,<character>)
    Perform an SQL query by directly passing the SQL string
    sql_query()
    Submit an SQL query to a database object
    table_node()
    Make a table_node
    to_icd10()
    Convert character to icd10
    use_cache()
    Turn the cache on or off
    vec_ptype_abbr(<icdb_icd10>)
    For this to work, I needed to import the generic. This feels unnecessary -- find the proper way to set a method for a generic not in the class.
    write_cache()
    Write an element into the cache
    write_level2()
    Flush entry to the level2 cache

    Developed by John Scott, Nick Sunderland.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.0.6.
